sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react' import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabaseClient' import { UsersIcon, CalendarIcon, ShoppingBagIcon, PlusIcon, ArrowTrendingUpIcon, UserGroupIcon, ClockIcon, SparklesIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline' import { IMAGES } from '../../constants/images' export const Dashboard: React.FC = () => { const [profile, setProfile] = useState(null) const [upcomingSessions, setUpcomingSessions] = useState([]) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [stats, setStats] = useState({ sessionsJoined: 0, playersFound: 0, listings: 0, posts: 0 }) useEffect(() => { loadData() }, []) const loadData = async () => { const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser() const { data: profileData } = await supabase .from('users') .select('*') .eq('id', user?.id) .single() setProfile(profileData) // Get real stats const { count: sessionsCount } = await supabase .from('session_participants') .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true }) .eq('user_id', user?.id) const { count: listingsCount } = await supabase .from('marketplace') .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true }) .eq('seller_id', user?.id) setStats({ sessionsJoined: sessionsCount || 0, playersFound: 5, // Placeholder listings: listingsCount || 0, posts: 8 // Placeholder }) const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] const { data: sessions } = await supabase .from('sports_sessions') .select('*, session_participants(count)') .gte('session_date', today) .order('session_date', { ascending: true }) .limit(4) setUpcomingSessions(sessions || []) setLoading(false) } if (loading) { return (

Loading your dashboard...

) } const cards = [ { title: 'Find Players', icon: UsersIcon, path: '/find-players', desc: 'Connect with players near you', gradient: 'from-blue-500/20 to-blue-600/10', iconBg: 'bg-blue-500/20', iconColor: 'text-blue-400' }, { title: 'Create Session', icon: PlusIcon, path: '/create-session', desc: 'Organize a sports session', gradient: 'from-green-500/20 to-green-600/10', iconBg: 'bg-green-500/20', iconColor: 'text-green-400' }, { title: 'Browse Sessions', icon: CalendarIcon, path: '/browse-sessions', desc: 'Find sessions to join', gradient: 'from-purple-500/20 to-purple-600/10', iconBg: 'bg-purple-500/20', iconColor: 'text-purple-400' }, { title: 'Marketplace', icon: ShoppingBagIcon, path: '/marketplace', desc: 'Buy & sell equipment', gradient: 'from-orange-500/20 to-orange-600/10', iconBg: 'bg-orange-500/20', iconColor: 'text-orange-400' }, ] return (
{/* Animated Background */}
{/* Background Image with Overlay */}
{/* Content */}
{/* Welcome Section */}
Dashboard

Welcome back,{' '} {profile?.full_name?.split(' ')[0] || 'Player'} 👋

Ready to play? Here's what's happening today.

{/* Stats Grid */}
{[ { label: 'Sessions Joined', value: stats.sessionsJoined, icon: CalendarIcon, color: 'from-blue-500/20 to-blue-600/10', border: 'hover:border-blue-500/50', iconBg: 'bg-blue-500/20', iconColor: 'text-blue-400' }, { label: 'Players Found', value: stats.playersFound, icon: UserGroupIcon, color: 'from-emerald-500/20 to-emerald-600/10', border: 'hover:border-emerald-500/50', iconBg: 'bg-emerald-500/20', iconColor: 'text-emerald-400' }, { label: 'Active Listings', value: stats.listings, icon: ShoppingBagIcon, color: 'from-orange-500/20 to-orange-600/10', border: 'hover:border-orange-500/50', iconBg: 'bg-orange-500/20', iconColor: 'text-orange-400' }, { label: 'Posts', value: stats.posts, icon: ArrowTrendingUpIcon, color: 'from-purple-500/20 to-purple-600/10', border: 'hover:border-purple-500/50', iconBg: 'bg-purple-500/20', iconColor: 'text-purple-400' }, ].map((stat, index) => (

{stat.label}

{stat.value}

))}
{/* Feature Cards */}
{cards.map((card, index) => (

{card.title}

{card.desc}

Explore →
))}
{/* Upcoming Sessions */}

Upcoming Sessions

Sessions happening soon

View all →
{upcomingSessions.length === 0 ? (
🏟️

No upcoming sessions

Be the first to create a session!

Create Session
) : (
{upcomingSessions.map((session, index) => { const participantCount = session.session_participants?.[0]?.count || 0 const isFull = participantCount >= session.max_participants const progress = (participantCount / session.max_participants) * 100 return (
{session.sport_type} {isFull ? ( 🔴 Full ) : ( {session.max_participants - participantCount} spots left )}

📍 {session.location}

📅 {session.session_date} at {session.session_time.substring(0, 5)}

{participantCount} players {session.max_participants} max
View
) })}
)}
{/* Footer Decoration */}
⚡ TeamSynk v2.0 Premium
) }
